violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Clean up procedures printed for PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Wood is used in the construction of splash guard and various shelving. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Would to be sealed or covered with a non porous/easily cleanable material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The floors behind equipment and under shelving has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Th establishment is lacking a person licensed through RIDOH CFP as needed at the time of inspection. Application printed for PIC at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Wooden Surfaces of the following were observed to be untreated/unsealed... - The hand sink splash guard framing - Walk-In rack/shelf for eggs - The microwave table/counter unit Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other FOOD soiling or that require frequent cleaning shall be constructed of a CORROSION-RESISTANT, nonabsorbent, and SMOOTH material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine chemical sanitizing solution for the dish machine and sani-buckets. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
Floor tiles in the kitchen area were observed in poor repair (chipped/cracked with worn grout lines). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024

The kitchen and dry storage areas were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris under/behind equipment. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2024
